name: Breakfast Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the zucchini and mushrooms.
2. Sauté the zucchini and mushrooms in a nonstick skillet until just cooked through.
3. Add the green onions and continue sautéing until all vegetables are heated through.
4. Pour in the liquid egg substitute and cook until nearly set.
5. Stir in the cottage cheese and heat through, mixing well.
6. Warm the tortillas (optional).
7. Assemble the burritos by filling the tortillas with the cooked vegetable mixture, egg substitute, and cottage cheese. Serve as is or wrap tightly for easy eating.
